# CityTwin — Neighborhood Matching App
# https://citytwinapp.com

CityTwin is a neighborhood matching and lifestyle companion for people
relocating to new cities. It matches users to neighborhoods based on
how they actually live — walkability, food scene, coffee culture,
fitness, faith community, nightlife, and more.

## Pages
/ — Landing page
/find — 3-step lifestyle quiz (city, priorities, preferences)
/results — Top 3 neighborhood matches with lifestyle scores
/places — Interactive map with venues by neighborhood

## Cities covered
Charlotte NC, Chicago IL, Dallas TX, Houston TX, Atlanta GA,
Seattle WA, Phoenix AZ, Montgomery County MD. Expanding regularly.

## Model
Free: #1 neighborhood match
Premium ($9 one-time or $5/month): All 3 matches + full venue map

## Built with
Next.js 14, Supabase, Mapbox, Azure Functions, Stripe
